title: Spitting Image
description: Spit on anything you don't like with a press of a button
body:
# A simple mod that adds a spitting mechanic to the player.
## Ever wanted do spit like the Llama do? Now you can with this Mod! Press a Button (, (comma) by default) to do so!

for 1.21.10+ **Forge**: Changed spit cooldown and damage config from COMMON to SERVER. To access them, go to your saved world in your file manager of choice (Explorer for example) and go to the "serverconfig" folder, there you find "spittingimage-server.toml" and configure at your hearts content (Multi and Single player identical).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1qOEzCazBnc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Fabric version requires MidnightLib
